message:
fix(fsfs): harden DiskBudgetPolicy division-by-zero and backoff_delay panic

DiskBudgetPolicy::evaluate() used a debug_assert! for budget_bytes > 0,
which is stripped in release mode, causing a division-by-zero panic.
Replace with a runtime guard that treats zero budget as Critical stage.

ContentionPolicy::backoff_delay() called Duration::from_secs_f64() on a
value that could be negative or NaN if backoff_multiplier is misconfigured
(e.g. negative). from_secs_f64 panics on non-finite/negative input. Add
a guard that falls back to initial_backoff for invalid computed delays.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
